_comment:
Semantic drift gate evidence registry. Provides per-evidence contract fields (consumed by tools/audit/evidence_ceiling.py::ceiling_from_evidence_object) plus an evidence_by_file fallback that links every span of a given file to a named evidence entry when no inline [evidence: <id>] marker is present in the span.

Added 2026-04-21 for Canon Closure Protocol v1.0: the Kuramoto dense-graph analytical case (Claim C-001) is registered as status='proved' so the drift gate authorises tier-8 language (proof / law / universal-within-scope) for spans of the manuscript and the operational lemma record.

lemma_1_kuramoto_dense.method: Restrepo-Ott-Hunt 2005 spectral onset formula reformulated in operational K(C) variables; numerical verification via mean-field self-consistency K_c = median_K(K * (1 - r^2)) on mid-supercritical grid
lemma_1_kuramoto_dense.window: N in {30, 100, 300, 1000, 3000}, 48 samples per N, Lorentzian Delta=0.5, master seed 7
lemma_1_kuramoto_dense.controls: bootstrap CI n=2000, asymptotic-only vs full-fit comparison, adapter delta_value cross-check
lemma_1_kuramoto_dense.fake_alternative: three methodology variants tested (threshold crossing, wide K-grid, narrow mid-supercritical); finite-size bias documented as estimator artefact rather than analytical falsification
lemma_1_kuramoto_dense.falsifier: canon_closure_check H3 guard: primary-fit 95% CI must contain gamma = 1.0
lemma_1_kuramoto_dense.interpretation_boundary: Kuramoto dense-graph regime only (assumptions A0..A3, adjacency lambda_1 in Theta(N)); non-complete graphs, sparse expanders, and non-Lorentzian frequency distributions are explicitly open problems (docs/LEMMA_1_KURAMOTO_GAMMA_UNITY.md sec 7.2-7.4)

cross_substrate_empirical.substrate: zebrafish, HRV PhysioNet, EEG PhysioNet, Gray-Scott, Kuramoto simulation, BN-Syn
cross_substrate_empirical.signal: per-substrate gamma exponent of cost-complexity scaling
cross_substrate_empirical.controls: surrogate-null hierarchy from docs/NULL_MODEL_HIERARCHY.md; IAAFT and latent-variable nulls
cross_substrate_empirical.fake_alternative: shuffled controls, supercritical controls, white-noise controls
cross_substrate_empirical.falsifier: substrate removed from evidential lane if any §5.1 gate of docs/CLAIM_BOUNDARY.md fails
cross_substrate_empirical.interpretation_boundary: Cross-substrate convergence conjecture (Claim C-004, Conjectural layer); no cross-substrate theorem is asserted
